name: learning-opportunities
description: Science-based learning exercises for deliberate skill development during AI-assisted coding

interface.shortDescription: Deliberate learning exercises during AI-assisted coding
interface.longDescription: Offers optional 10-15 minute learning exercises after substantial coding work, using prediction, generation, retrieval practice, and reflection to help users build durable expertise while using AI coding tools.
defaultPrompt: Offer a learning exercise for the work we just finished
Run a repo orientation learning exercise
